aethelraed_flapper_dress.author: Aethelraed_Unraed
aethelraed_flapper_dress.description: 20s inspired dress. Made this for a project of mine and releasing it to the public on what happens to be the day of the Women's March against Trump. What coincidence Warning: mesh uses both tris and quads. The current release of MakeHuman doesn't seem to have a problem with it: it shows up correctly and exports correctly to Blender including rigging. It may not work for everyone's system/MH release though so use with caution. It may export incorrectly crash MakeHuman fry your computer or release the nuclear codes to a bloke called Donald. Oh wait that last one's already been done nevermind Known issues: - Using Blender Subsurf modifier after importing from mhx2 may crash Blender or cause other issues. Doing a degenerate dissolve on the dress after import seems to fix this issue although Blender says nothing happened . - As is the case with pretty much all dresses extreme poses may look awkward. Two additional materials are available at the materials page: http://www.makehumancommunity.org/materials.html. Attribution not required but always appreciated

mindfront_kimono.author: Mindfront
mindfront_kimono.description: Tags: Female Robe Casual A very simple robe. It will deform very badly when posing because this time I made no effort to create special vertex binding groups. The robe was meant to use cloth simulator for the final fittness and creating folds. Preview from MakeHuman viewport.

toigo_bodice_dress_with_lace_ruffle_skir.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_bodice_dress_with_lace_ruffle_skir.description: This is a dress with a bodice-style top and a lace ruffle skirt. It was made with the Blender cloth simulator. Illustration shows dress with subsurf of two. A diffuse texture is included. Jacklyn is also wearing my Peeptoe Pumps http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/peeptoe_pumps.html in Natural http://www.makehumancommunity.org/content/peeptoe_pumps_natural.html .

toigo_camisole_dress_with_full_skirt.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_camisole_dress_with_full_skirt.description: This is a camisole-style dress with a full skirt. It was made made with Blender's cloth simulator. The dress will fit female and mostly female humans but some adjustments may be needed for toddler senior and plus-size humans. A diffuse texture is included. Illustration shows dress with subsurf of two.

toigo_cut_out_dress.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_cut_out_dress.description: This is a dress with cut outs at the waist. It was made with the Blender cloth simulator. Illustration shows dress with subsurf of two. A diffuse texture is included. Jacklyn is also wearing my Flats http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/flats.html in Giraffe print http://www.makehumancommunity.org/content/flats_giraffe.html .

toigo_dress_with_tiered_skirt.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_dress_with_tiered_skirt.description: This is a dress with a tiered skirt. It was made with Blender cloth sim. It will fit most female humans and even some males without much distortion. The neck may need slight adjusting on senior humans. The illustration is toon shaded because that's how I roll these days but the .mhmat file is configured for default shading.

toigo_halter_dress_knee_length.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_halter_dress_knee_length.description: This is a knee-length halter dress that was made with Blender cloth sim. One diffuse texture is included. Illustration shows dress with subsurf of two. Whitney is also wearing my Hand Gloves http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/hand_gloves.html and my Heels with Lace Frill Socks http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/heels_with_lace_frill_socks.html in Black and White http://www.makehumancommunity.org/content/heels_with_lace_frill_socks_black_and_white.html .

toigo_halter_dress_midi.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_halter_dress_midi.description: This is a midi-length halter dress that was made with Blender cloth sim. One diffuse texture is included. Illustration shows dress with subsurf of two. Whitney is also wearing my Medium Gloves http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/medium_gloves.html and my Ballet Flats http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/ballet_flats.html .

toigo_halter_dress_with_fluted_skirt.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_halter_dress_with_fluted_skirt.description: This is a long dress with a fluted skirt. It was made with Blender cloth sim. One diffuse texture is included. Illustration shows dress with subsurf of two and crease 1.0 on the two loops where the skirt is connected to the dress. Whitney is also wearing my Long Gloves http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/long_gloves.html

toigo_keyhole_neck_dress.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_keyhole_neck_dress.description: This is a dress with a keyhole neck that will fit most humans but looks best on average adult females. It was made with the Blender cloth sim sewing springs for the fit and regular cloth for cloth-like folds. Recommended modifiers: Solidify .1 in/.25 cm -1 only rim and Subsurf 1 will do but 2 is better . Eight additional materials are available in Materials.

toigo_shift_dress.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_shift_dress.description: This is a simple shift dress. It was made with the Blender cloth simulator. Illustration shows dress with subsurf of two. A diffuse texture is included. Jacklyn is also wearing my Heels with Lace Frill Socks http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/heels_with_lace_frill_socks.html in Black and White http://www.makehumancommunity.org/content/heels_with_lace_frill_socks_black_and_white.html .

toigo_strapless_ruffle_top_dress.author: MargaretToigo
toigo_strapless_ruffle_top_dress.description: This is a strapless dress with a lace ruffle top and fringe. It was made with the Blender cloth simulator. Illustration shows dress with subsurf of two. A diffuse texture is included. Jacklyn is also wearing my Peeptoe Pumps http://www.makehumancommunity.org/clothes/peeptoe_pumps.html in Floral print http://www.makehumancommunity.org/content/peeptoe_pumps_floral.html .

wdg_mycenaean_tunic.author: WDG
wdg_mycenaean_tunic.description: This tunic is based off of the tunics depicted in a fresco of charioteers in Pylos from the Mycenaean period of the Greek Bronze Age.
